raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A green can is on a gray table. The can is cylindrical and rigid. STRATEGY - To knock it over, push it from the side. This requires reaching the can, applying force to its body, and moving it sideways. Failure mode: if the push is too weak, the can won't move; if too strong, it might roll off the table. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the can body for contact; Step 2 push the can body to apply force; Step 3 ensure the can is knocked over (tilted).**
Goal: knocked_over(green_can)
Scene: green_can, table
Step 1: reach(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_can) < 0.03
Step 2: push(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: contact(gripper, green_can) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(1, 0, 0) [progress]
  safety: no_slip(green_can)
  done_when: contact(gripper, green_can)
Step 3: push(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: contact(gripper, green_can) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_can, >, 0.05) [progress]
  direction: push_axis(1, 0, 0) [progress]
  safety: no_slip(green_can)
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_can) > 0.05
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green can
the body of the green can
the body of the green can
